### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>klauspost/compress (github.com/klauspost/compress)</summary>

### [`v1.18.5`](https://redirect.github.com/klauspost/compress/releases/tag/v1.18.5)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/klauspost/compress/compare/v1.18.4...v1.18.5)

#### What's Changed

- zstd: Fix crash when changing encoder dictionary with same ID by [@​klauspost](https://redirect.github.com/klauspost) in [#​1135](https://redirect.github.com/klauspost/compress/pull/1135)
- zstd: Default to full zero frames by [@​klauspost](https://redirect.github.com/klauspost) in [#​1134](https://redirect.github.com/klauspost/compress/pull/1134)
- flate: Clean up histogram order by [@​klauspost](https://redirect.github.com/klauspost) in [#​1133](https://redirect.github.com/klauspost/compress/pull/1133)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/klauspost/compress/compare/v1.18.4...v1.18.5>

</details>
